name: quick-backup-restore
description: Time Clawshine is a simple but powerful time machine for OpenClaw — hourly encrypted snapshots of your agent's brain (memory, sessions, config) so you can roll back to exactly 2 hours ago, not yesterday. Powered by restic's incremental deduplication — only changed bytes are stored, so backups are near-instant and storage stays tiny. YAML-configured, silent on success, Telegram-notified on failure.
